taskTemplate.name: Send Commitment Letter
taskTemplate.description: Send loan commitment letter to borrower with conditions after underwriting approval

subTaskTemplate.name: Send Commitment Letter
subTaskTemplate.description: Send Commitment Letter – Click Done to send the commitment letter electronically to the borrower; marking Done will trigger the electronic send
subTaskTemplate.type: Send Commitment Letter – Send Commitment Letter

subTaskTemplate.name: Confirm Letter Sent
subTaskTemplate.description: Confirm Letter Sent – Confirm the commitment letter has been successfully sent to the borrower
subTaskTemplate.type: Send Commitment Letter – Confirm Letter Sent

subTaskTemplate.name: Save to eFolder
subTaskTemplate.description: Save to eFolder – Ensure the commitment letter is saved to the eFolder
subTaskTemplate.type: Send Commitment Letter – Save to eFolder
